expectations.text: Uses the IMPACT() function (not BISTOP or a manual IF expression)
First arg uses DZ or similar displacement measuring penetration below floor
expectations.evidence: First arg is 'DZ(.model.part.cm, .model.ground.floor_ref, .model.ground.floor_ref)' — Z-component of CM position from floor reference

expectations.text: Second arg uses VZ or matching velocity measure
Threshold value is 0.0 (or equivalent contact point)
expectations.evidence: Third argument is '0.0' — contact activates when DZ drops below 0.0

expectations.text: Stiffness 1e5, exponent 1.5, damping 50, penetration 0.1 all present
expectations.evidence: Found: '1.0E5, 1.5, 50.0, 0.1' in correct IMPACT argument positions

expectations.text: Expression wrapped in double quotes as required for FUNCTION= parameter
expectations.evidence: Expression shown as: '"IMPACT(DZ(.model.part.cm, ...), ..., 0.0, 1.0E5, 1.5, 50.0, 0.1)"' — properly quoted. CMD block also uses 'function = "IMPACT(...)"'
